response.justification: Maria has a strong background in software engineering, distributed systems, and technical leadership, demonstrating excellent initiative through open-source contributions and mentoring. However, she falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, possessing only a few months of professional C++ experience. Given the role's focus on leading a C++ based internal cloud compute platform, her primary expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang does not align with the core technical needs of this position.
strengths: Extensive experience designing and launching distributed systems and cloud infrastructure using Kubernetes, AWS, and microservices.
Proven technical leadership and mentoring capabilities, evidenced by Staff-level roles, founding an open-source platform, and organizing engineering workshops.
Strong advocacy for engineering best practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
concerns: Critically lacks the minimum required 8 years of C++ programming experience, with only about 7 months of professional C++ work listed.
Cloud infrastructure experience is heavily skewed towards web applications and Node.js/TypeScript ecosystems rather than low-level compute platforms or hardware architecture.
Does not demonstrate significant production-level architecture experience specifically focused on internal compute, virtualization, or storage technologies.
